tools.name: debt_payoff_plan
tools.description: Plan how to pay off debt(s): returns months to debt-free, total interest, and payoff order — comparing the snowball (smallest balance first) and avalanche (highest APR first) strategies. Accepts one debt or many.

tools.name: budget_50_30_20
tools.description: Split a monthly take-home income into a 50/30/20 budget (needs / wants / savings & debt). Returns dollar targets for each bucket. Optional custom percentages.

tools.name: savings_goal
tools.description: How long to reach a savings goal. Given a target amount, monthly contribution, optional current savings and APY, returns months/years to reach it and total contributed.
